issues.issue_description: Your endpoint is not encrypted at rest!
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence evaluated and accepted. Issue closed automatically.
issues.agent_reasoning: The vendor provided a PowerShell screenshot showing BitLocker is fully encrypted and protection is on for the C: drive, directly addressing the previous insufficiency.
